translated: That's all for the announcements.
Love Live! Superstar!! Yu-Yu-Yu Friendship Lunchtime Broadcasting Station Liella!
Radio. It's almost time to say goodbye for today.
Here is the information for our upcoming broadcasts.
For episode 266, scheduled for Tuesday, March 31st, we'll continue to have Yabushima Akane, the voice of Mei Yoneme, as our guest.
And for episode 267 on Tuesday, April 7th, we'll welcome Ookuma Wakana, the voice of Kinako Wakana, for a Tomari-Kanon-Shiki trio episode.
We're looking forward to your messages!
So, how did you enjoy today's broadcast?
How was it?
How was it?
Ding ding ding!
Wait, is it always like this?
Ding ding ding!
Sakura, are you okay?
Oh no, oh no, oh no!
Saku, you actually surprised me just now.
I didn't expect you to join in on that side.
I was thinking, "When did Sakura become like this?"
She's genuinely worried about you.
I couldn't think of a comeback, so I figured I'd just roll with it instead.
That's wonderful.
Yeah, that's great.
Yabushima looked so confused just now.
Saku, she was worried about you!
Being pitied is the most embarrassing thing.
Anyway, how was it for you today?
Well, I got to share my thoughts in such great detail... or rather, I talked a lot.
Was that really okay?
Thank you so much.
I'm sure everyone wanted to hear it.
We'll be talking more next week, too.
That's right.
I wonder how long we're allowed to keep talking about the 7th Live.
We're planning for about three years. Roughly, anyway.
We'll keep going until we've covered every single song.
Oh, then let's do every single one.
We won't be able to do the Unit Live at this rate!
I don't know about that.
We'll push through!
Push through!
Push through!
Well then, this has been Love Live! Superstar!! Yu-Yu-Yu Friendship Lunchtime Broadcasting Station Liella!
